meaning: n.美拉尼西亚(西南太平洋岛群,词原意为"黑人群岛")
examples: Micronesia, the area north of Melanesia, consists primarily of small scattered islands.
People of Melanesia refer to their god as " Mana ".
A symbol of beauty and speed on the Pacific islands of Melanesia.
For the poorer countries of Melanesia, where bulges in the populations of young people threaten social unrest, the freer movement of labour is more enticing.
Their journeys and settlements stretch from South East Asia and Melanesia in the West, to Hawaii in the north, Rapanui or Easter Island in the East and Aotearoa New Zealand in the South.
